name: Apple Keynote Presentation
description: Schema representing the structure of an Apple Keynote presentation, including slides, text elements, images, shapes, transitions, and build animations.

title.description: The title of the Keynote presentation.

description.description: A description or subtitle for the presentation.

author.description: The author or creator of the presentation.

createdDate.description: The date and time the presentation was created.

modifiedDate.description: The date and time the presentation was last modified.

theme.description: The theme applied to the presentation.

slideSize.description: The dimensions of the presentation slides.

slides.description: The ordered collection of slides in the presentation.
